Environmental context: in golden autumn, crisp fall air, vibrant red and orange foliage carpeting the ground, at harsh midday sun, high noon, bright piercing daylight, sharp high-contrast shadows, with perfectly clear cloudless sky, calm and peaceful weather. featuring wild, overgrown lavender shrubs swaying chaotically in the breeze, with remnants of a forgotten stone bridge stretching across the landscape, featuring the structure of a grand, majestic mosque featuring a gleaming golden dome and tall slender minarets, decorated with a row of massive, crumbling stone guardians lining a forgotten pathway, dominated by the relic of the decaying husk of an ancient military tank, half-buried in the earth and heavily overgrown with vibrant moss, an echo of a forgotten war, with the crashed remains of a hollowed-out rusted submarine half-buried in the dirt, its hull breached and eaten by decades of corrosion, showing traces of rusted metallic debris half-buried in the terrain, where a soaring golden eagle circling high above in the vast sky, showing a small group of explorers dwarfed by the massive environment, visually enhanced by cinematic anamorphic lens flares with wide horizontal blue light streaks.
